label: Royal title
description: Defines a rank in a faction's royal title hierarchy (e.g. Knight, Count, Duke). Referenced by RoyalImplantRule.minTitle and other royalty-related fields.

seniority.label: Seniority
seniority.description: Numeric rank value. Higher seniority means a more senior title. Used to order titles and resolve inheritance.

favorCost.label: Favor cost
favorCost.description: Empire favor required to be awarded this title. A value of 0 means the title is not awardable via favor.

labelFemale.label: Label (female)
labelFemale.description: Alternate title label used for female pawns. If omitted, the standard label is used for all genders.

changeHeirQuestPoints.label: Change heir quest points
changeHeirQuestPoints.description: Points granted for the change-heir quest associated with this title. Required for awardable titles (favorCost > 0). Defaults to -1 (undefined).

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight for how often this title appears among NPC pawns. Defaults to 1.

disabledWorkTags.label: Disabled work tags
disabledWorkTags.description: WorkTags flags listing work categories that are forbidden for pawns holding this title. Each li element is one WorkTags flag name.

inheritanceWorkerOverrideClass.label: Inheritance worker override class
inheritanceWorkerOverrideClass.description: C# class overriding the faction's default RoyalTitleInheritanceWorker for this title.

requiredMinimumApparelQuality.label: Required minimum apparel quality
requiredMinimumApparelQuality.description: Minimum quality level that all required apparel pieces must meet for this title.

requiredApparel.label: Required apparel
requiredApparel.description: Apparel requirements a pawn must meet to hold this title without a mood penalty.

permits.label: Permits
permits.description: RoyalTitlePermitDefs that pawns at this title rank can select when receiving the title.

minExpectation.label: Minimum expectation
minExpectation.description: The minimum ExpectationDef tier a pawn holding this title must meet to avoid mood penalties.

disabledJoyKinds.label: Disabled joy kinds
disabledJoyKinds.description: JoyKindDefs that pawns holding this title are not allowed to use for recreation.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Arbitrary string tags used to group or filter titles in quests and other systems.

rewards.label: Rewards
rewards.description: Items given to a pawn upon receiving this title.

suppressIdleAlert.label: Suppress idle alert
suppressIdleAlert.description: If true, the game suppresses the idle pawn alert for pawns holding this title.

canBeInherited.label: Can be inherited
canBeInherited.description: If true, this title can be passed to an heir when the holder dies.

allowDignifiedMeditationFocus.label: Allow dignified meditation focus
allowDignifiedMeditationFocus.description: If true (default), pawns with this title may use the dignified meditation focus type.

permitPointsAwarded.label: Permit points awarded
permitPointsAwarded.description: Number of permit points the pawn gains when awarded this title.

awardWorkerClass.label: Award worker class
awardWorkerClass.description: C# class (RoyalTitleAwardWorker subclass) that handles the award sequence for this title. Defaults to RoyalTitleAwardWorker.

awardThought.label: Award thought
awardThought.description: ThoughtDef (Thought_MemoryRoyalTitle subclass) given to a pawn when they receive this title.

lostThought.label: Lost thought
lostThought.description: ThoughtDef (Thought_MemoryRoyalTitle subclass) given to a pawn when they lose this title.

throneRoomRequirements.label: Throne room requirements
throneRoomRequirements.description: RoomRequirements that the pawn's assigned throne room must meet.

bedroomRequirements.label: Bedroom requirements
bedroomRequirements.description: RoomRequirements that the pawn's assigned bedroom must meet.

recruitmentResistanceOffset.label: Recruitment resistance offset
recruitmentResistanceOffset.description: Flat offset added to the recruitment resistance of pawns holding this title.

foodRequirement.label: Food requirement
foodRequirement.description: Defines the minimum food quality and allowed food types or specific ThingDefs that satisfy this title's food requirement.

replaceOnRecruited.label: Replace on recruited
replaceOnRecruited.description: When a pawn with this title is recruited, their title is replaced by this RoyalTitleDef.

decreeMtbDays.label: Decree mean time between (days)
decreeMtbDays.description: Mean time in days between random decree events for this title. Set to -1 to disable decrees. Defaults to -1.

decreeMinIntervalDays.label: Decree minimum interval (days)
decreeMinIntervalDays.description: Minimum days between two consecutive decree events. Defaults to 2.

decreeMentalBreakCommonality.label: Decree mental break commonality
decreeMentalBreakCommonality.description: Relative weight for the mental break decree type. Higher values increase the chance of a mental break decree.

decreeTags.label: Decree tags
decreeTags.description: String tags filtering which decree types are available to pawns holding this title.

grantedAbilities.label: Granted abilities
grantedAbilities.description: AbilityDefs unlocked for the pawn while they hold this title.

speechCooldown.label: Speech cooldown
speechCooldown.description: Cooldown in ticks between uses of the Speech ability. Serialized as a single integer (RimWorld treats it as min == max of an IntRange).

maxPsylinkLevel.label: Max psylink level
maxPsylinkLevel.description: Maximum psylink level a pawn may hold while at this title rank.
